channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Here is what $100 oil means for Bitcoin network
item.description: Research shows that only 8% to 10% of global Bitcoin hashrate runs in oil-sensitive power markets, suggesting that geopolitical shocks may affect BTC prices more than mining costs.

item.title: Alleged Ponzi scheme victims sue JPMorgan for banking supposed $328 million scam
item.description: The proposed class action suit said Chase provided “the essential banking infrastructure” for Goliath Ventures’ alleged fraud, despite red flags it claims made the scheme “obvious.”

item.title: Bitcoin holds $70,000 level as surging oil prices and credit issues have stocks tumbling
item.description: U.S. President Trump said stopping Iran is more of a concern than oil prices, as crude climbed 10% on Thursday.

item.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest says quantum computing is a long-term risk for bitcoin, not an imminent threat
item.description: Today’s quantum computers are far from breaking Bitcoin’s cryptography and any real threat would likely emerge gradually, giving the network time to adapt.

item.title: Prediction markets get tailored U.S. guidance from former foe CFTC
item.description: The agency that once fought the events contracts platforms in court has now issued a new policy stance and is proposing permanent rules for oversight.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum should be used as a simple digital bulletin board
item.description: Ethereum’s co-founder wants developers to stop forcing blockchain into every problem and start treating it as a reliable, shared memory for the digital world.

item.title: Circle’s outperformance highlights USDC’s staying power, says bullish Wall Street analyst
item.description: William Blair said Circle’s recent rally reflects more than macro factors, pointing to USDC resilience and growing recognition of the firm’s stablecoin infrastructure advantage.

item.title: Bitcoin catching up to gold hints at an ‘opportunity within risk’
item.description: Bitcoin showed early signs of overtaking gold in the market as new data outlined an opportunity based on historical returns around the US midterm elections.

item.title: Lido launches stablecoin yield product to expand beyond ether
item.description: The goal is to make it easier for users to earn returns on crypto without having to choose or manage strategies themselves.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto accounting; comparing the US and Europe
item.description: Crypto assets defy traditional accounting rules, posing huge risks for auditors and fund managers. Ganna Vitko breaks down U.S. vs EU trends.

item.title: Avalanche’s business chief says crypto must grow up and solve real problems
item.description: John Nahas argues blockchain’s next phase is custom infrastructure for companies, not one-size-fits-all chains chasing hype.

item.title: Bitcoin selling intensifies across all wallet sizes despite price holding near $70,000
item.description: Glassnode’s Accumulation Trend Score drops to 0.04 as smaller wallet cohorts offload BTC while macro headwinds intensify.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Ark Invest sees one-third of Bitcoin supply at risk from quantum threat
item.description: Ark and Unchained say about one-third of the Bitcoin supply remains exposed to future quantum threats, though the risk is still years away.

item.title: Eightco shares jump on $125 million funding commitment, investment in OpenAI, Beast Industries
item.description: Eightco holds a digital asset treasury that includes some 277 million WLD tokens and 11,000 ether.

item.title: Crypto ATM losses surge 33% in 2025 as AI superpowers scams: CertiK
item.description: Crypto ATMs or kiosks are the “lowest-friction extraction channel available to scammers,” said cybersecurity firm CertiK.

item.title: Not Your Keys, Not Your Coins: What True Self-Custody Actually Requires
item.description: New research examines how investor behavior, wallet architectures, and operational security practices determine what genuine self-custody requires in 2026.

item.title: I was recently at Real World Crypto (that's crypto as in cryptography) and the associated side events, and one thing that struck me was that it was a clarifying experience in terms of understanding *what blockchains are for*. We blockchain people (myself includ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE82LW1qS1I2cFhScE9IemQtbjZtLUlObkJFSTlHZnlxQU9kNUNqSWtIM0c5MVpuMkZjM21ZZTFqQUlVcXlwc2J6aV9Ha3NSZ2dNaW9wRy1hWGRSQ3BSSlVkVE1lRF91Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">I was recently at Real World…

item.title: Bitcoin hugs $70K range as March Fed rate cut odds fall below 1%
item.description: Bitcoin reacted in kind to calm US macro data, while oil stayed volatile amid uncertainty over the duration of the Middle East conflict.

item.title: Tether invests in Ark Labs to make Bitcoin ready for stablecoins and payments
item.description: The issuer behind the USDT stablecoin joined a $5.2 million funding round for Ark Labs, backing software that could let stablecoins move and settle on Bitcoin rails.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Polkadot (DOT) drops 2.3% as index trades lower
item.description: Aptos (APT), down 2.3% from Wednesday, was also among the underperformers.

item.title: FATF warns offshore crypto firms create money laundering and sanctions gaps
item.description: A new FATF report says crypto exchanges operating offshore can create gaps in AML enforcement, making it harder for regulators to track illicit activity.

item.title: Tether Backs Ark Labs’ $5.2 Million Bet on Bitcoin’s Stablecoin Revival
item.description: Ark Labs’ latest funding builds upon efforts to return stablecoin giant Tether to its Bitcoin-based roots

item.title: MoonPay X Games League Athletes Will Be Offered Exodus Stablecoin Bonus
item.description: Athletes drafted on Thursday to compete in the MoonPay X Games League are set to receive signing bonuses in Exodus-powered stablecoins.

item.title: New BlackRock Staked Ethereum Fund to Pay 82% of Rewards to Investors
item.description: BlackRock's new ETHB fund launches Thursday, sharing 82% of Ethereum staking rewards with investors through monthly payments.

item.title: BlackRock launches staked Ethereum ETF offering ETH exposure and yield
item.description: BlackRock’s iShares Staked Ethereum Trust ETF will trade on the Nasdaq, offering spot exposure and staking income with a reduced 0.12% fee on the first $2.5 billion.

item.title: Crypto accounting firm Cryptio raises $45 million as institutional demand accelerates
item.description: The company's platform tracks digital assets, storage locations and crypto loans, enabling financial institutions and corporations to produce accounting records and financial reports.

item.title: Binance says US midterms could boost Bitcoin and stocks
item.description: Binance Research says US midterms could set up a rebound for Bitcoin and stocks, though oil shocks and Middle East tensions may weigh near term.

item.title: Perp DEXs become the latest battleground for blockchains
item.description: Chains are launching perp DEXs to capture trading activity, but history suggests liquidity will consolidate around only a handful of platforms.

item.title: Why Ray Dalio says Bitcoin can’t replace gold
item.description: Ray Dalio argues Bitcoin cannot replace gold as a store of value, citing central bank demand, market maturity and Bitcoin’s risk-asset behavior.

item.title: Stablecoins are becoming crypto’s largest wasted resource
item.description: Stablecoins move trillions each year but mostly sit unused, leaving a widespread inefficiency across crypto markets.

item.title: Singapore Jails Man Over $6.9M SafeX Crypto Theft Case
item.description: Prosecutors said Zhang Xinghua helped move stolen funds through Tornado Cash after unauthorized access drained SafeX-linked wallets in 2025.

item.title: South Korea plans to use AI for crypto tax enforcement
item.description: The National Tax Service has opened a procurement bid for a platform to analyze crypto trading data and flag potential tax evasion.

item.title: Morning Minute: Ripple Buybacks, Across Explores Token-to-Equity Swaps
item.description: Ripple is buying back shares at a $50 billion valuation, while Binance is pushing back at the Wall Street Journal's recent reporting.

item.title: BlackRock debuts staked ether ETF as demand grows for yield in crypto funds
item.description: The BlackRock’s iShares Staked Ethereum Trust ETF (ETHB) lets investors earn staking rewards alongside spot ETH exposure.

item.title: Bitcoin Recovers Above $70K as Tanker Attacks Push Oil Back Over $100
item.description: Bitcoin rebounded as Gulf shipping strikes sent Brent crude past $101, with analysts split on near-term outlook.

item.title: Chinese fraud victims challenge UK redress plan for 61,000 seized Bitcoin: FT
item.description: Chinese investors defrauded in the Zhimin Qian case are asking the UK High Court to reject a redress plan for 61,000 seized Bitcoin, saying it could deprive them of the assets’ gains.

item.title: Bitcoin buyers ‘in control’ but trend won't change until this level breaks
item.description: Bitcoin analysts said buyers were regaining control, but reclaiming $78,000 as support was key to reversing the overall downtrend.

item.title: Bitcoin futures trading is now five times bigger than spot on Binance
item.description: The futures-to-spot ratio has climbed to 5.1, reflecting a structural shift in how the market trades.

item.title: Bitcoin looks resilient, but don't ignore those $20,000 puts
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 12, 2026

item.title: Binance is proud to join Mastercard's new Crypto Partner Program. We're one of the inaugural industry leaders connecting on-chain innovation with everyday commerce. This brings crypto closer to people across the globe. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9NeERXbXphVXhYRl9ERVdhRzByT3phdXkxREZnblZtOUxudExIeXNFbXRQQmJsU3IySDVpODBvdGkyaGlSY0l4bnk0OG5jNTY4R2plejdYSnpndU5n?oc=5" target="_blank">Binance is proud to join Mastercard's new …

item.title: JPMorgan sued over alleged role in $328M crypto Ponzi scheme
item.description: Investors allege JPMorgan helped facilitate fund flows in a $328 million crypto Ponzi scheme, while a parallel federal case targets Goliath Ventures’ founder.

item.title: Strategy’s STRC buys an estimated 7,000 bitcoin this week, but Two Prime CEO warns ‘no free lunch’
item.description: Two Prime CEO Alexander Blume says the high yield product driving the buying surge carries risks despite strong momentum.

item.title: Bitcoin climbs the wall of worry amid escalating Iran war and stock market losses
item.description: BTC holds near $70,000 and outperforms major assets during Middle East tensions, even as derivatives data and fear indicators signal deep market pessimism.

item.title: Bitcoin Miners ‘Sitting on a Gold Mine’ as AI Demand Ramps Up: VanEck
item.description: VanEck’s Matthew Sigel argued miners are redirecting infrastructure to AI while trading at a discount to traditional data-center peers.

item.title: Utah set to block prediction markets as state-federal tensions rise
item.description: CFTC Chair Michael Selig has said that the agency has authority over prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket and warned it will defend that jurisdiction in court if challenged.

item.title: 🚨 KIYOSAKI: The biggest stock market crash in history may be starting in 2026, the 2008 crisis was never truly fixed. “Acquire gold, silver, Bitcoin, Ethereum, and oil.” - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9tem9SaTk3Wk9IeW1maXZkcFktM2dXMVZxS1BiMm9Rb3JxV3RiR0ZSWnF6b2tiaUtnMjF3ck9HeW5uZ0pURmZUOHRpaWhRTGtKcml3TnE3cTd6VnUtWTdQLWVYVVE?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 KIYOSAKI: The biggest stock …

item.title: US prosecutors urge judge to deny Sam Bankman-Fried retrial bid: Report
item.description: Prosecutors say testimony from two former FTX executives cited by the defense does not qualify as newly discovered evidence, Bloomberg reported.

item.title: Bonk.fun warns hackers hijacked domain in wallet-drainer attack
item.description: Bonk.fun warned users not to use its site after attackers hijacked the domain and pushed a fake wallet-draining prompt.

item.title: New Zealand regulator says NZDD stablecoin not a financial product
item.description: Law firm MinterEllisonRuddWatts, which acted on behalf of the stablecoin’s issuer, says the designation of the token is an important step for regulatory clarity.

item.title: Metaplanet Deepens Bitcoin Strategy With $25M Investment Plan, New Venture Arm
item.description: Metaplanet is launching two subsidiaries and backing Japan's first licensed yen stablecoin as it bets on the country's digital asset infrastructure.

item.title: SEC, CFTC Strike Pact to Coordinate Crypto Rules and Oversight
item.description: The agencies have moved to coordinate oversight, in a bid to end years of regulatory overlap on the treatment of crypto.

item.title: Hackers Hijack Bonk.fun Domain, Deploy Wallet-Draining Phishing Prompt
item.description: Browser warnings flagged the site for suspected phishing after attackers pushed a fake TOS message designed to trick users.

item.title: Today our Board approved the establishment of two new wholly owned subsidiaries, Metaplanet Ventures and Metaplanet Asset Management. Metaplanet Ventures is our commitment to Japan's Bitcoin ecosystem. We'll be investing ¥4 billion over the next few - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBvQlBWSTd5ekFDdjB3aDQ4ZExrVWQwdHpBRGgxbVhYM0pMNndaakM1QmNVWXlHMTAzQXJMcUdNWURYVXRoeVBZa2lBRFJUQzYxYmFCWGVYT3o5a25XM1E?oc=5" target="_blank">Today our Board approved the establishm…

item.title: As a shareholder, I would love for Binance's valuation to increase. But the fact is, Binance's valuation can't increase when crypto prices are down. It can't get simpler than that. Stating the obvious: Binance is the largest crypto exchange. It grows and shrinks with - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5ramFIUTFBU1BUR25ZUW02ZkcyTG9lTGx6UkI2R2tnZkljVnVUaXk1dzh5b3VyYWNxLXhwZEpYUnNaNkJhcHM0aFBGRGU4VWdOWFh6OWg5Xzg1clU5dWFQbQ?oc=5" target="_blank">As a shareholder, I would love for B…

item.title: Crypto Traders Turn to Hyperliquid for Oil Bets Amid Iran Volatility
item.description: Nearly $1 billion in synthetic oil futures were traded on Wednesday amid reactions to geopolitical tensions and fears of future price spikes.

item.title: Most AI Chatbots Will Help a Teen Plan a Mass Shooting, Study Finds
item.description: A new study found eight of the 10 major AI chatbots helped fake teen accounts plan school shootings, assassinations, and bombings.

item.title: Ripple Begins Buying Back Shares at $50 Billion Valuation: Bloomberg
item.description: The XRP-linked Ripple is buying back shares from investors and employees at a $50 billion valuation, according to a report from Bloomberg.

item.title: Officially a Cowboy ✍️ #DallasCowboys | @blockchain - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5yOFBOVDRDd0pLLUYxby1MSzdLVUllemNjREpSbzZPLXZldUVYRVVvQkxfRnBNalVFMXBlMmNCSDNtTGp5MXNuUTJydkF5T1hUT0RJOURva2F5c1Y0WEFlTTFzaFg?oc=5" target="_blank">Officially a Cowboy ✍️ #DallasC…

item.title: This is a total lie @MartyBent. We have never and will never lobby against Bitcoin. Ever. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9rYmYzaXJyYTF1QTRvaUUzTmNwNkY4MF9NdnlCc3pUVnhEOWJ6Z2NweXJUNnZlNXVRNllEbjFkY1R5OVZXaXlmV2ZHSWwtVms0bzVPM3ZwelVMXzZuU2Ita0xxckM?oc=5" target="_blank">This is a total lie @MartyBent.…
